testcase.name: auth.middleware verifyRole forbids when user role is not in required list

testcase.classname: auth.middleware verifyRole allows when user role matches one of the required roles
testcase.name: auth.middleware verifyRole allows when user role matches one of the required roles

testcase.classname: auth.middleware verifyRole allows when only one role required and matches
testcase.name: auth.middleware verifyRole allows when only one role required and matches

testcase.classname: auth.middleware verifyRole forbids when required list is empty
testcase.name: auth.middleware verifyRole forbids when required list is empty

testcase.classname: PostService.createPost creates post without event link when no event_id
testcase.name: PostService.createPost creates post without event link when no event_id

testcase.classname: PostService.createPost links post to event when event_id provided
testcase.name: PostService.createPost links post to event when event_id provided

testcase.classname: PostService.checkIfPostBelongsToClub returns true when club_id matches
testcase.name: PostService.checkIfPostBelongsToClub returns true when club_id matches

testcase.classname: PostService.checkIfPostBelongsToClub returns falsy when no post
testcase.name: PostService.checkIfPostBelongsToClub returns falsy when no post

testcase.classname: PostService.getPostDetails throws when post not found
testcase.name: PostService.getPostDetails throws when post not found

testcase.classname: PostService.getPostDetails returns normalized post + comments
testcase.name: PostService.getPostDetails returns normalized post + comments

testcase.classname: AdminService.getAllReports flattens reports from all sources into a single array
testcase.name: AdminService.getAllReports flattens reports from all sources into a single array

testcase.classname: AdminService.getStats counts only active clubs and events
testcase.name: AdminService.getStats counts only active clubs and events

testcase.classname: AdminService.getFacilitiesUsage returns zero distribution when no reservations
testcase.name: AdminService.getFacilitiesUsage returns zero distribution when no reservations

testcase.classname: AdminService.getFacilitiesUsage returns percentage breakdown
testcase.name: AdminService.getFacilitiesUsage returns percentage breakdown

testcase.classname: AdminService.approveEvent approval sets event to scheduled and assigns room
testcase.name: AdminService.approveEvent approval sets event to scheduled and assigns room

testcase.classname: AdminService.approveEvent rejection sets event to cancelled
testcase.name: AdminService.approveEvent rejection sets event to cancelled

testcase.classname: UserService.createUser hashes password before persisting
testcase.name: UserService.createUser hashes password before persisting

testcase.classname: UserService.banUser / unbanUser banUser sets status to 0
testcase.name: UserService.banUser / unbanUser banUser sets status to 0

testcase.classname: UserService.banUser / unbanUser unbanUser sets status to 1
testcase.name: UserService.banUser / unbanUser unbanUser sets status to 1

testcase.classname: UserService.getStudentById hasClub=true when manager mapping exists
testcase.name: UserService.getStudentById hasClub=true when manager mapping exists

testcase.classname: UserService.getStudentById hasClub=false when no mapping
testcase.name: UserService.getStudentById hasClub=false when no mapping

testcase.classname: GET /api/reservations/ 401 without token
testcase.name: GET /api/reservations/ 401 without token

testcase.classname: GET /api/reservations/ 403 for admin (students only)
testcase.name: GET /api/reservations/ 403 for admin (students only)

testcase.classname: GET /api/reservations/ 200 returns array for student
testcase.name: GET /api/reservations/ 200 returns array for student

testcase.classname: ClubService.createClub creates club without managers when std_ids is empty
testcase.name: ClubService.createClub creates club without managers when std_ids is empty

testcase.classname: ClubService.createClub creates club with managers and upgrades each student
testcase.name: ClubService.createClub creates club with managers and upgrades each student

testcase.classname: ClubService.checkUserIsClubManager returns true when user appears in members list
testcase.name: ClubService.checkUserIsClubManager returns true when user appears in members list

testcase.classname: ClubService.checkUserIsClubManager returns false otherwise
testcase.name: ClubService.checkUserIsClubManager returns false otherwise

testcase.classname: ClubService.isUserFollowingClub returns true when user appears in followers
testcase.name: ClubService.isUserFollowingClub returns true when user appears in followers

testcase.classname: saveLog creates the file and writes one entry
testcase.name: saveLog creates the file and writes one entry

testcase.classname: saveLog appends subsequent entries
testcase.name: saveLog appends subsequent entries

testcase.classname: saveLog recovers from malformed JSON by resetting the file
testcase.name: saveLog recovers from malformed JSON by resetting the file

testcase.classname: saveLog resets to array when file content is a non-array JSON
testcase.name: saveLog resets to array when file content is a non-array JSON
